idea-plugin.name: Code Exporter for AI
idea-plugin.description:
Code Exporter for AI

Export selected project files into .txt format for AI analysis, audits, documentation, and reviews.

  • Any folder, not only opened project - choose any directory on disk
  • Smart filters - all files, source files, Java/Kotlin, or XML only
  • .gitignore option - skip ignored files when needed
  • AI-oriented stats - file count, size, line count, and token estimate
  • Export modes - keep folder structure or flatten into one output directory

This plugin works fully offline and does not send code to external services.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 1.0.1 - Stability and scalability update.
  • Fixed deprecated API usage in file tree component for better forward compatibility.
  • Added huge-file handling modes: skip, partial export, or full export.
  • Improved large-project behavior with streaming stats and parallel scan filtering.
  • Improved cancellation handling during scan and export operations.
  • 1.0.0 - Initial public release.
  • Directory picker independent from the currently opened IDE project.
  • File tree with filtering, optional .gitignore support, and export statistics.
  • Flat and structured export modes with progress reporting.
